title: ericameria cuneata var. spathulata
intro: Ericameria cuneata var. spathulata, also known as a shrub or bush, is a variety of the gray rabbitbrush plant native to the southwestern United States and northern Mexico. The medicinal properties of Ericameria cuneata var. spathulata include its anti-inflammatory and antibacterial properties, making it useful for treating wounds and infections. The health benefits of this plant include its ability to reduce inflammation, promote healing, and support the immune system. Herbal preparations of Ericameria cuneata var. spathulata can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, which can be used topically or internally to reap its medicinal benefits.
